news.title:
Aditya Birla Real Estate gets BSE nod to amend debenture trust deed clauses.
Changes include early redemption call option for Rs. 250 cr unsecured debentures.
news.summary:
Aditya Birla Real Estate gets BSE nod to amend debenture trust deed clauses.
Changes include early redemption call option for Rs. 250 cr unsecured debentures.

news.title:
Birla Estates partners with Parinee Group for a 1.3-acre redevelopment in Mumbai's Khar West.
The luxury project spans 2.9 lakh sq.ft. with INR 1,700 crore revenue potential.
news.summary:
Birla Estates partners with Parinee Group for a 1.3-acre redevelopment in Mumbai's Khar West.
The luxury project spans 2.9 lakh sq.ft. with INR 1,700 crore revenue potential.

news.title:
Aditya Birla Real Estate faces Rs 4.85 cr demand for stamp duty, registration fees.
The company plans to contest the order; no immediate financial impact reported.
news.summary:
Aditya Birla Real Estate faces Rs 4.85 cr demand for stamp duty, registration fees.
The company plans to contest the order; no immediate financial impact reported.

news.title:
Aditya Birla Real Estate faces ₹24L GST input tax credit demand for FY20.
Demand includes tax, interest, penalty; company to appeal, expects no material impact.
news.summary:
Aditya Birla Real Estate faces ₹24L GST input tax credit demand for FY20.
Demand includes tax, interest, penalty; company to appeal, expects no material impact.

news.title:
Aditya Birla Real Estate gets BSE approval to amend debenture trust deed.
Changes include call option, removal of asset disposal clause over ₹200Cr; ₹400Cr NCDs at 8.1% involved.
news.summary:
Aditya Birla Real Estate gets BSE approval to amend debenture trust deed.
Changes include call option, removal of asset disposal clause over ₹200Cr; ₹400Cr NCDs at 8.1% involved.

news.title:
Aditya Birla Real Estate confirmed redemption of Commercial Paper (ISIN INE0S5A14KK7).
The payment was duly made to all holders on 18th February 2026.
news.summary:
Aditya Birla Real Estate confirmed redemption of Commercial Paper (ISIN INE0S5A14KK7).
The payment was duly made to all holders on 18th February 2026.

news.title:
Aditya Birla Real Estate Ltd to attend Axis Capital Advantage India Conference on 10th Feb 2026.
No unpublished price-sensitive information will be shared during the investor meet.
news.summary:
Aditya Birla Real Estate Ltd to attend Axis Capital Advantage India Conference on 10th Feb 2026.
No unpublished price-sensitive information will be shared during the investor meet.

news.title:
Aditya Birla Real Estate Ltd confirmed timely payment of Rs. 31.9 crore in interest and Rs. 400 crore in NCD principal redemption.
The payments were made on January 30, 2026, as per regulatory requirements and SEBI guidelines.
news.summary:
Aditya Birla Real Estate Ltd confirmed timely payment of Rs. 31.9 crore in interest and Rs. 400 crore in NCD principal redemption.
The payments were made on January 30, 2026, as per regulatory requirements and SEBI guidelines.

news.title:
Aditya Birla Real Estate reports margins of 25-30%, some projects exceed 40%.
Management sees Birla Arika project boosting value, returns on remaining inventory.
news.summary:
Aditya Birla Real Estate reports margins of 25-30%, some projects exceed 40%.
Management sees Birla Arika project boosting value, returns on remaining inventory.

news.title:
Aditya Birla Real Estate targets INR 650 cr revenue from Birla Tisya in FY27.
Revenue from Niyaara Tower 1 expected in FY28 and Tower 2 in FY29.
news.summary:
Aditya Birla Real Estate targets INR 650 cr revenue from Birla Tisya in FY27.
Revenue from Niyaara Tower 1 expected in FY28 and Tower 2 in FY29.

news.title:
Aditya Birla Real Estate's Q3 FY26 booking value surged 276% YoY to ₹25,361 Mn.
Collections rose 157% YoY to ₹12,899 Mn; area sold grew 325% YoY to 1.7 Mn Sq Ft.
news.summary:
Aditya Birla Real Estate's Q3 FY26 booking value surged 276% YoY to ₹25,361 Mn.
Collections rose 157% YoY to ₹12,899 Mn; area sold grew 325% YoY to 1.7 Mn Sq Ft.

news.title:
Aditya Birla Real Estate Ltd schedules an earnings call on 29 Jan 2025 at 11 AM IST to discuss Q3 FY26 results.
Senior management including MDs and CFOs from Aditya Birla Real Estate and Birla Estates will participate in the call.
news.summary:
Aditya Birla Real Estate Ltd schedules an earnings call on 29 Jan 2025 at 11 AM IST to discuss Q3 FY26 results.
Senior management including MDs and CFOs from Aditya Birla Real Estate and Birla Estates will participate in the call.

news.title:
Aditya Birla Real Estate Ltd received BSE approval to amend clauses in its Debenture Trust Deed for debentures under ISIN INE055A08045.
Amendments include adding an early redemption call option clause and deleting the clause related to asset disposal.
news.summary:
Aditya Birla Real Estate Ltd received BSE approval to amend clauses in its Debenture Trust Deed for debentures under ISIN INE055A08045.
Amendments include adding an early redemption call option clause and deleting the clause related to asset disposal.

news.title:
Aditya Birla Real Estate Ltd to host a site visit for investors/analysts on Jan 9, 2026.
Projects in Gurugram, including Birla Navya, Sirla Pravah, and Sirla Arika, will be showcased.
news.summary:
Aditya Birla Real Estate Ltd to host a site visit for investors/analysts on Jan 9, 2026.
Projects in Gurugram, including Birla Navya, Sirla Pravah, and Sirla Arika, will be showcased.

news.title:
CCI approved ITC's acquisition of Century Pulp and Paper business via slump sale.
The acquisition is as a going concern; update for investor information.
news.summary:
CCI approved ITC's acquisition of Century Pulp and Paper business via slump sale.
The acquisition is as a going concern; update for investor information.

news.title:
CCI approves ITC's acquisition of Aditya Birla Real Estate's paper and pulp business.
This approval enables ITC to expand its operations in the paper segment.
news.summary:
CCI approves ITC's acquisition of Aditya Birla Real Estate's paper and pulp business.
This approval enables ITC to expand its operations in the paper segment.

news.title:
Aditya Birla Real Estate got BSE approval to modify financial covenant on Rs. 500 Cr debentures.
Net Debt to Equity ratio limit revised to 1.75x (consolidated) from 1.10x (standalone) effective Apr 1, 2026.
news.summary:
Aditya Birla Real Estate got BSE approval to modify financial covenant on Rs. 500 Cr debentures.
Net Debt to Equity ratio limit revised to 1.75x (consolidated) from 1.10x (standalone) effective Apr 1, 2026.

news.title:
Aditya Birla Real Estate confirms redemption of Commercial Paper ISIN INEOSSA14KI1 on 20th Nov 2025.
Company informed BSE, complying with Chapter XVII of Operational Circular for CP issuance and listing.
news.summary:
Aditya Birla Real Estate confirms redemption of Commercial Paper ISIN INEOSSA14KI1 on 20th Nov 2025.
Company informed BSE, complying with Chapter XVII of Operational Circular for CP issuance and listing.
